limitations: No quantified dollar amounts tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; AI spend is bundled within broader technology/infrastructure references.
The finance IT modernization project is explicitly described as not requiring 'meaningful capital investment', limiting capex signal.
Narrative concreteness is limited to named initiatives without deployed metrics or quantified outcomes; score reflects named programs only.

Risk section material is present and AI risks are discussed with company-specific mechanisms (cybersecurity, competitive disadvantage, regulatory exposure), supporting a score of 4, but no quantified risk figures or named governance bodies were found to justify a score of 5.
